note: Source of truth for app metadata. apps/index.html renders its OWN custom display order; this file is the chronological list.

apps.title: Haven
apps.tagline: A private, post-quantum social network for the people you love
apps.note: Peer-to-peer, end-to-end encrypted, post-quantum social network for friends & family. No servers, no tracking, no ads. Nobody holds your keys.

apps.title: Tri-Add
apps.note: A complete, ground-up rebuild of the original 2014 Tri-Add — relaunched June 2026 with additive + subtractive mixing, inversions, and turn-based multiplayer.

apps.title: Tilebreak
apps.tagline: Match. Combo. Clear. Polished Mahjong solitaire

apps.title: Blip
apps.tagline: Featherlight macOS menu bar system monitor
apps.note: macOS menu-bar network & S.M.A.R.T. monitor with live MTR traceroute map, per-volume speed tests, kill-process controls, and a full Shortcuts (App Intents) catalog.

apps.title: Sami
apps.note: Smart photo & video optimizer that reclaims storage with quality-aware compression — keeps working via background continued-processing and is fully scriptable from Shortcuts. v1.2.0 live; v1.2.1 in review.

apps.title: Enter Space
apps.tagline: Local-feeling access to every cloud you use
apps.note: Unified, local-feeling access to 100 cloud providers across iPhone, iPad, Mac & Apple TV — with full-content Spotlight indexing, encrypted offline mirror (Keep Offline), 24 Shortcuts & Siri actions, and an Apple Watch companion that syncs your cloud media to your wrist and flips through a photo folder on the watch face. Scheduled syncs add rate-limit tuning (TPS limit, low-level retries, auto-abort) for providers like pCloud.

apps.title: Luma Editor
apps.note: Photo editor that matches a look you like and applies it to your shots — with Vision-named one-tap styles and Siri-driven edits via Shortcuts. Universal on iPhone, iPad & Mac.

apps.title: Embr
apps.note: Debt-payoff tracker that lets you watch each balance literally burn away as you pay it down — with an Apple Watch app and complication showing your live payoff rings, plus Siri & Shortcuts.

apps.title: Ari Helper
apps.note: All-in-one AI chat with on-device LLMs plus your favorite cloud models — and an Apple Watch app that remote-controls the chat from your wrist while your paired iPhone runs the model.

apps.title: Mi Speaks
apps.note: Text-to-speech reader for any written content, with a standalone Apple Watch player that reads along through the built-in speaker and highlights each word. v1.4.4 live; v1.5.0 in review.

apps.title: Pano Owl
apps.note: Originally launched March 2021. Fully relaunched as a 2.x ground-up rebuild on a hybrid OpenCV + Metal stitch engine (PanoKit) with a SwiftUI interface — true 360° equirectangular output, gigapixel memory-bounded stitching, an immersive in-app 360 viewer, and background continued-processing stitching from Shortcuts. Live on iOS, iPadOS & macOS.
